The '''''Redoubt''''' was a [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]] that saw service in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It was commanded by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Denn Wessex]] during the [[Battle of Boz Pity (Clone Wars)|Battle of Boz Pity]] in [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]].<ref name="Holonet" />
